_meta.note: Mock offer data with realistic titles and product image mappings. Covers all 4 eligibility states.

offers.title: $2 Off Breakfast Combo
offers.description: Get $2 off any Breakfast Combo meal. Valid during breakfast hours only.
offers.terms: Valid on breakfast combos only. Not valid with other offers.

offers.title: $3 Off Qualifying Purchase of $20 or more
offers.description: Save $3 when you spend $20 or more on your order.
offers.terms: Minimum $20 purchase required. One use per account.

offers.title: Happy Wendy-versary! Free 6pc Chicken Nuggets w/ Purchase
offers.description: Celebrate your Wendy's anniversary with free 6pc Chicken Nuggets with any purchase.
offers.terms: Valid with any purchase of $1 or more. One use per account.

offers.title: $1 Off Any Size Soft Drink w/ $5 Qualifying Purchase
offers.description: Get $1 off any size Coca-Cola Freestyle beverage when you spend $5 or more.
offers.terms: Valid on Coca-Cola Freestyle beverages. $5 minimum purchase required.

offers.title: Free Small Frosty with Any Purchase
offers.description: Get a free Small Chocolate or Vanilla Frosty when you make any purchase of $1 or more.
offers.terms: Valid with any purchase of $1 or more.

offers.title: Free 10 Pc. Nuggets with $15+ Order
offers.description: Spend $15 or more and get a free 10 Pc. Chicken Nuggets added to your order.

offers.title: Free Delivery on Orders Over $12
offers.description: Get free delivery when your order subtotal is $12 or more.

eligibility.reason: Delivery not available at selected location

offers.terms: Valid for delivery orders $12+. Limited to participating locations.

offers.title: 50% Off Breakfast Combo
offers.description: Get 50% off any Breakfast Combo. Valid during breakfast hours only.

eligibility.reason: Only available during breakfast hours (6:30 AM - 10:30 AM)

offers.terms: Valid during breakfast hours only. Not valid with other offers.

offers.title: Free Small Fries — Welcome Offer
offers.description: Welcome to Wendy's Rewards! Enjoy a free Small Fries on us.
offers.terms: One-time welcome offer for new Rewards members.
